solution:
<AnimatePresence initial={false}>
  {items.map(i => (
    <motion.li key={i.id}
      initial={{opacity: 0, x: -20}}
      animate={{opacity: 1, x: 0}}
      exit={{opacity: 0, x: 20}}
      layout
    >{i.label}</motion.li>
  ))}
</AnimatePresence>
what_breaks_naive_approach: A naive animation for AnimatePresence list add/remove only checks the first visual impression. It breaks when framer motion on web is interrupted, focus changes mid-transition, reduced-motion users need an instant equivalent, or layout and paint work exceed the frame budget.
